summary: Frontend guest browsing flow fully tested and working. All 7 features passed: Splash screen auto-redirects to Home (not login), guest users can browse products without registration, Cart and Profile show login prompts, Login screen has Skip button. Bharggo logo appears on all screens.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'useNativeDriver is not supported because the native animated module is missing. Falling back to JS-based animation.'
react_native_issues.impact: Animations work but use JS instead of native driver (expected for web preview)

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'style.resizeMode is deprecated. Please use props.resizeMode.'
react_native_issues.impact: Images render correctly, just deprecation warning

critical_code_review_comments: EXCELLENT: Splash screen correctly redirects to home (guest browsing) instead of login
EXCELLENT: Home page shows 'Welcome!' for guests and Login button in header
EXCELLENT: Products tab loads 10 products without authentication required
EXCELLENT: Cart tab shows proper guest prompt with 'Login to view your cart' message and Login/Register button
EXCELLENT: Profile tab shows guest mode with Bharggo logo and login/register options
EXCELLENT: Login screen has Skip button that returns to home for guest browsing
EXCELLENT: Register screen has all required fields: name, email, mobile (+91), address, pincode, referral code (optional)
EXCELLENT: Bharggo logo (https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/job_fashion-ecosystem/artifacts/vbop5gr2_logo_bharggo-removebg-preview.png) appears on all screens
EXCELLENT: All testID attributes present for automated testing
EXCELLENT: Guest browsing flow allows users to browse products and categories without registration, only requiring login for cart/profile/orders

frontend_test_results.splash_screen_redirect: PASSED - Shows Bharggo logo on dark background, auto-redirects to Home after 2.5s (not login)
frontend_test_results.home_guest_mode: PASSED - Shows Bharggo logo in header, 'Welcome!' greeting, Login button, products and categories visible without auth
frontend_test_results.products_tab: PASSED - Shows Bharggo logo in header, 10 products loaded, search input, category filters (All, Kids, Men, Women) - all without authentication
frontend_test_results.cart_guest_mode: PASSED - Shows Bharggo logo, cart icon, 'Login to view your cart' message, 'Register or login to add products and place orders' subtitle, Login/Register button with testID
frontend_test_results.profile_guest_mode: PASSED - Shows Bharggo logo (160x160), 'Join Bharggo Fashion' title, subtitle about benefits, Login and Create Account buttons with testIDs
frontend_test_results.login_screen: PASSED - Shows Bharggo logo, 'Welcome Back' title, email input, Send OTP button, Skip button (top right) that returns to home
frontend_test_results.register_screen: PASSED - Shows Bharggo logo, all required fields present: Full Name, Email Address, Mobile Number with +91 prefix, Full Address (multiline), Pin Code, Referral Code (Optional), Continue button

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Backend already has 10 products seeded
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guest browsing flow fully implemented and tested. Major change from iteration 1: Splash screen now redirects to Home instead of Login. Users can browse products, categories, and home page without registration. Registration is only required when accessing Cart, Profile, or placing orders. All screens show Bharggo logo. Email OTP is MOCKED (check backend logs for OTP codes). Next testing should focus on: (1) Complete registration and login flow with OTP, (2) Authenticated user experience (cart operations, profile features, wallet, referrals), (3) Subscription flow (₹111 payment), (4) Order creation and tracking.
